pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.2.x to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespace; Spring Boot 2.7.x is incompatible with Java 21 features and lacks Jakarta EE support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17+ baseline; compiling with Java 8 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact relies on javax.servlet (Java EE), which is removed in Jakarta EE (Spring Boot 3); using it causes compile errors due to missing packages.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update springdoc version to 2.5.0 to match the new starter artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 1.8.0 is for the old javax-based artifact; version 2.x is required for the Jakarta-based starter.
